originalTitle: Goodbye officer, hello touchscreen - a vision for policing in Ethiopia
title: Goodbye officer, hello touchscreen - a vision for policing in Ethiopia
content: A project to introduce unmanned sites is part of a broader adoption of digital technologies.

originalTitle: Belgium detains three suspected Cameroon separatists in war crimes probe
title: Belgium detains three suspected Cameroon separatists in war crimes probe
content: Money is reportedly being raised by them for the armed struggle, prosecutors say.

originalTitle: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
content: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

originalTitle: South Korea’s stock market in meltdown amid US-Iran war
title: South Korea’s stock market in meltdown amid US-Iran war
content: Benchmark index plummets as much as 12.2 percent, eclipsing single-day plunge after 9/11 attacks in 2001.

originalTitle: The Iran strikes could become a midterm reckoning – for Trump and Israel
title: The Iran strikes could become a midterm reckoning – for Trump and Israel
content: Conservative dissent over the war is fracturing the GOP and testing the durability of US support for Israel.

originalTitle: Russia, China raise diplomatic voices against US-Israeli attacks on Iran
title: Russia, China raise diplomatic voices against US-Israeli attacks on Iran
content: China's foreign minister tells Israel to end attacks; Russian FM Lavrov says no sign Tehran seeking nuclear bomb.

originalTitle: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
content: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

originalTitle: US and Ecuador forces launch operation to fight drug trafficking
title: US and Ecuador forces launch operation to fight drug trafficking
content: Washington says the two countries are combatting what the US calls designated terrorist organisations in the South American country.

originalTitle: What to know about the 'two sessions',  China's biggest political meeting
title: What to know about the 'two sessions',  China's biggest political meeting
content: The carefully choreographed annual meetings signal the priorities of the world's second-largest economy.

originalTitle: 'Same old story' for Slot as Wolves 'keep fighting'
title: 'Same old story' for Slot as Wolves 'keep fighting'
content: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot began the week by saying he found most Premier League games no longer a joy to watch - and had little to enjoy as he described defeat at Wolves as the "same old story".

originalTitle: England deliver Wiegman's 'clear win' to make World Cup statement
title: England deliver Wiegman's 'clear win' to make World Cup statement
content: A "clear win" was what Sarina Wiegman wanted from her England side against Ukraine - and that was what they delivered in a bright start to their World Cup qualifying campaign.

originalTitle: 'The hunger is big' - Sunderland reach 40 points and want more
title: 'The hunger is big' - Sunderland reach 40 points and want more
content: By reaching 40 points with victory at Leeds on Tuesday, Sunderland have pretty much ensured Premier League survival by early March.
